texts.label: text
texts.orig: We are excited to host you, whether you are on holiday, diving,  kite  surfing,  retreat  or  as  a  digital  nomad,  we want  you  to  feel  as  comfortable  as  possible.  Temple Point  has  everything  you  need  from  excursions  and wellness to great food and lovely scenery. Take a walk on  our two  beaches,  enjoy  our  colourful botanical garden and explore our menus from around the world, all at your fingertips!
texts.text: We are excited to host you, whether you are on holiday, diving,  kite  surfing,  retreat  or  as  a  digital  nomad,  we want  you  to  feel  as  comfortable  as  possible.  Temple Point  has  everything  you  need  from  excursions  and wellness to great food and lovely scenery. Take a walk on  our two  beaches,  enjoy  our  colourful botanical garden and explore our menus from around the world, all at your fingertips!

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Below we have compiled a thorough information booklet for all your wants and desires. If you don't find the information you are looking for, please get in contact with reception. We look forward to making your stay one to remember...
texts.text: Below we have compiled a thorough information booklet for all your wants and desires. If you don't find the information you are looking for, please get in contact with reception. We look forward to making your stay one to remember...

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Each room comes equipped with a universal connection plug board. In case you still need an adapter, please contact reception.
texts.text: Each room comes equipped with a universal connection plug board. In case you still need an adapter, please contact reception.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For your own safety as well as the well-being of the animals, it is not allowed to feed any animals in the hotel. Please don't leave food of any kind outside the room. Remember to keep your doors & windows closed as monkeys are curious.
texts.text: For your own safety as well as the well-being of the animals, it is not allowed to feed any animals in the hotel. Please don't leave food of any kind outside the room. Remember to keep your doors & windows closed as monkeys are curious.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: There are several banks and ATMs in Watamu. Please note that sometimes EC Cards will not be accepted by the ATM. Therefore please have your passport available for direct withdrawal at the counter.
texts.text: There are several banks and ATMs in Watamu. Please note that sometimes EC Cards will not be accepted by the ATM. Therefore please have your passport available for direct withdrawal at the counter.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Your security is important to us. Please don't book any boat trips, excursions or safaris with people you met on the beach. Even though their prices often seem relatively cheap, their offer usually doesn't include insurance or a guarantee for a safe and carefree itinerary. Should you still opt to make such a booking, please be advised to never pay in advance and please inform our reception of your absence.
texts.text: Your security is important to us. Please don't book any boat trips, excursions or safaris with people you met on the beach. Even though their prices often seem relatively cheap, their offer usually doesn't include insurance or a guarantee for a safe and carefree itinerary. Should you still opt to make such a booking, please be advised to never pay in advance and please inform our reception of your absence.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Our open air cinema, located at Bazaar, runs every Friday, Saturday and Sunday evening. It requires headphone rentals at a small fee. Please see the movie lists on our social media page @templepointresort or on our InfoDesk at the reception area.
texts.text: Our open air cinema, located at Bazaar, runs every Friday, Saturday and Sunday evening. It requires headphone rentals at a small fee. Please see the movie lists on our social media page @templepointresort or on our InfoDesk at the reception area.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: To activate your AC, please insert your room key card into the tray underneath it and use the available remote control. In order to protect the environment, please keep your AC switched off while you are outside of the room.
texts.text: To activate your AC, please insert your room key card into the tray underneath it and use the available remote control. In order to protect the environment, please keep your AC switched off while you are outside of the room.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We will happily provide you with a baby crib. Please contact our reception team.
texts.text: We will happily provide you with a baby crib. Please contact our reception team.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: LichtHaus: 12pm - 10pm (please reserve a table for bookings after 4pm) Main Pool Bar: 9am - 6pm Bazaar: 7am - 12pm Sunset Bar: 3pm - 12pm
texts.text: LichtHaus: 12pm - 10pm (please reserve a table for bookings after 4pm) Main Pool Bar: 9am - 6pm Bazaar: 7am - 12pm Sunset Bar: 3pm - 12pm

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We would be proud to host your event at Temple Point! Please contact us well in advance so that we can work on each of your ideas - be it a birthday cake, a special flower arrangement or a romantic candlelit dinner at our Honeymooners Pavilion.
texts.text: We would be proud to host your event at Temple Point! Please contact us well in advance so that we can work on each of your ideas - be it a birthday cake, a special flower arrangement or a romantic candlelit dinner at our Honeymooners Pavilion.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: You can use our black and white copying service at the reception for a small fee. We charge 30KES per copy b/w and 50KES per copy coloured.
texts.text: You can use our black and white copying service at the reception for a small fee. We charge 30KES per copy b/w and 50KES per copy coloured.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We will be happy to organise your private transfer to the airport. Kindly contact our reception to schedule it.
texts.text: We will be happy to organise your private transfer to the airport. Kindly contact our reception to schedule it.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Our tap water is not drinking water. For the preparation of baby food, please use the bottles of water readily available in your room.
texts.text: Our tap water is not drinking water. For the preparation of baby food, please use the bottles of water readily available in your room.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: You can reach the beach on a small pathway next to House 1. At low tide you can make your way to the long beach. Please take note that it is strictly forbidden to take corals or mussels from the Marine Park with you.
texts.text: You can reach the beach on a small pathway next to House 1. At low tide you can make your way to the long beach. Please take note that it is strictly forbidden to take corals or mussels from the Marine Park with you.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: You can find several souvenirs as well as luxury items all manufactured and handcrafted in Kenya at our boutique located at the Bazaar restaurant.
texts.text: You can find several souvenirs as well as luxury items all manufactured and handcrafted in Kenya at our boutique located at the Bazaar restaurant.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The conference rooms at our hotel can host up to 300 people and come equipped with a beamer, flipchart and a sound system.
texts.text: The conference rooms at our hotel can host up to 300 people and come equipped with a beamer, flipchart and a sound system.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Please be aware that the palm trees have coconuts which, although rarely, are susceptible to falling. We try to keep them clear but please be careful when walking around the resort.
texts.text: Please be aware that the palm trees have coconuts which, although rarely, are susceptible to falling. We try to keep them clear but please be careful when walking around the resort.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In case you need to see a doctor or go to the pharmacy, please contact the reception.
texts.text: In case you need to see a doctor or go to the pharmacy, please contact the reception.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Temple Point is a famous event location. We offer several spots for your private events like weddings, birthdays, corporate events, honeymoons etc. As well, we run our Kaleidoscope Festival, a unique art & music concept, at least once a year.
texts.text: Temple Point is a famous event location. We offer several spots for your private events like weddings, birthdays, corporate events, honeymoons etc. As well, we run our Kaleidoscope Festival, a unique art & music concept, at least once a year.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For enquiries or further questions please contact us or follow our social media channels.
texts.text: For enquiries or further questions please contact us or follow our social media channels.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Small injuries can be treated with the emergency boxes at the reception, LichtHaus & Bazaar.
texts.text: Small injuries can be treated with the emergency boxes at the reception, LichtHaus & Bazaar.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: You can use our laundry service 7 days a week from 6am to 11pm. It usually takes 24hrs for your laundry to be cleaned, pressed and returned. Please find a laundry bag as well as a list of fees in your wardrobe. In case you need express service, please contact the reception.
texts.text: You can use our laundry service 7 days a week from 6am to 11pm. It usually takes 24hrs for your laundry to be cleaned, pressed and returned. Please find a laundry bag as well as a list of fees in your wardrobe. In case you need express service, please contact the reception.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: On your last day, your room will be
texts.text: On your last day, your room will be

texts.label: text
texts.orig: available to you up until 12am. We also offer a late check out option when arranged in advance. Please contact us beforehand for organisation and the fee involved. If you wish, we will store your luggage until your final departure.
texts.text: available to you up until 12am. We also offer a late check out option when arranged in advance. Please contact us beforehand for organisation and the fee involved. If you wish, we will store your luggage until your final departure.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Our rooms are equipped with triplepole plug sockets (240 Volt). Because of current fluctuations in Kenya, we advise you to disconnect sensible electronic devices when you are not using them.
texts.text: Our rooms are equipped with triplepole plug sockets (240 Volt). Because of current fluctuations in Kenya, we advise you to disconnect sensible electronic devices when you are not using them.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We offer several tailor-made activities, tours and experiences. Information on our Experiences is available at our Info Desk near the reception.
texts.text: We offer several tailor-made activities, tours and experiences. Information on our Experiences is available at our Info Desk near the reception.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: There are two golf courses available nearby. You can visit the Watamu Golf Club (Pitch & Putt) or the Vipingo Ridge in Kilifi. Our reception would be happy to organise your visit
texts.text: There are two golf courses available nearby. You can visit the Watamu Golf Club (Pitch & Putt) or the Vipingo Ridge in Kilifi. Our reception would be happy to organise your visit

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Please contact the reception regarding lost items. Please be kind and bring found items to the reception.
texts.text: Please contact the reception regarding lost items. Please be kind and bring found items to the reception.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Temple Point holds a SSI & PADI diving centre of Extra Divers Worldwide. Extra Divers offers both daily and nocturnal dives as well as complete diving courses. For any further information please visit our Dive Centre on the creekside between the volleyball court & LichtHaus.
texts.text: The Temple Point holds a SSI & PADI diving centre of Extra Divers Worldwide. Extra Divers offers both daily and nocturnal dives as well as complete diving courses. For any further information please visit our Dive Centre on the creekside between the volleyball court & LichtHaus.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Temple Point is located right in the cradle of Mother Nature, embedded between the shores of the Marine National Park. Because of our love for the environment we want to kindly ask you to switch off the air conditioner and TVs while you are not in your room.
texts.text: Temple Point is located right in the cradle of Mother Nature, embedded between the shores of the Marine National Park. Because of our love for the environment we want to kindly ask you to switch off the air conditioner and TVs while you are not in your room.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Please consult the rescue and emergency plan on the back of your door.
texts.text: Please consult the rescue and emergency plan on the back of your door.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: To connect please use as follows: Network: TemplePointGuest Password: KaribuTemple!@1
texts.text: To connect please use as follows: Network: TemplePointGuest Password: KaribuTemple!@1

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If you don't get connection please contact our reception.
texts.text: If you don't get connection please contact our reception.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: You can contact our hotel manager via the reception from 6am - 12am. They will provide help for all your unsettled requests.
texts.text: You can contact our hotel manager via the reception from 6am - 12am. They will provide help for all your unsettled requests.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The hotel is situated right on the shores of the Marine National Park. The Mangroves on the coast as well as the species populating them are environmentally protected and we kindly ask you to respect the natural habitat of those animals. Entering the park for snorkeling & boat trips comes at a fee of 17 USD per day, collected by the Kenyan Wildlife Service (KWS). Stand Up Paddling, Kiteboarding,
texts.text: The hotel is situated right on the shores of the Marine National Park. The Mangroves on the coast as well as the species populating them are environmentally protected and we kindly ask you to respect the natural habitat of those animals. Entering the park for snorkeling & boat trips comes at a fee of 17 USD per day, collected by the Kenyan Wildlife Service (KWS). Stand Up Paddling, Kiteboarding,

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Kajak & Kanu are without KWS fee.
texts.text: Kajak & Kanu are without KWS fee.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We offer money exchange service for USD, EURO or KES at the Cashier Point at the reception.
texts.text: We offer money exchange service for USD, EURO or KES at the Cashier Point at the reception.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Operating times: 24 hours Calls / WhatsApp: +254 774 283 444 E-mail: reception@templepointresort.com
texts.text: Operating times: 24 hours Calls / WhatsApp: +254 774 283 444 E-mail: reception@templepointresort.com

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Right across the reception you can find our Experience Desk. You can arrange for excursions to one of the many nearby sights as well as into the national parks there.
texts.text: Right across the reception you can find our Experience Desk. You can arrange for excursions to one of the many nearby sights as well as into the national parks there.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The sunlight at the equator is very intense! Please protect yourself as well as your children from it. It is advisable to wear sunscreen of at least SPF 20, sunglasses, hat and a tshirt - especially on the beach. Also please don't forget to drink enough water throughout the day.
texts.text: The sunlight at the equator is very intense! Please protect yourself as well as your children from it. It is advisable to wear sunscreen of at least SPF 20, sunglasses, hat and a tshirt - especially on the beach. Also please don't forget to drink enough water throughout the day.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Enjoy a relaxing massage in our WasserHaus Spa right next to the Mida Creek with a beautiful view of the ocean! Scan this QR Code for the menu:
texts.text: Enjoy a relaxing massage in our WasserHaus Spa right next to the Mida Creek with a beautiful view of the ocean! Scan this QR Code for the menu:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: You can pay for your hotel bill either in cash (USD, EUR, KSH) or with credit card (VISA, Mastercard) at our cashier at the reception desk. We recommend doing so the night before your departure in order to avoid any unnecessary delays on your departure day.
texts.text: You can pay for your hotel bill either in cash (USD, EUR, KSH) or with credit card (VISA, Mastercard) at our cashier at the reception desk. We recommend doing so the night before your departure in order to avoid any unnecessary delays on your departure day.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: You can drop your letters / postcards at the reception. Stamps as well as postcards are available for purchase at the boutique.
texts.text: You can drop your letters / postcards at the reception. Stamps as well as postcards are available for purchase at the boutique.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Apart from our KunstHaus Boutique in the Bazaar there are some shops and markets in Watamu. The nearby town of Malindi offers a wider variety of goods. Blue Marmalade is the main supermarket in Watamu.
texts.text: Apart from our KunstHaus Boutique in the Bazaar there are some shops and markets in Watamu. The nearby town of Malindi offers a wider variety of goods. Blue Marmalade is the main supermarket in Watamu.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The hotel is located at the Mida Creek, an arm of the ocean that reaches deep into the country. Especially during low
texts.text: The hotel is located at the Mida Creek, an arm of the ocean that reaches deep into the country. Especially during low

texts.label: text
texts.orig: and high tide, there can be strong currents. Therefore, please don't swim out too far. Our water sports team will be happy to provide you with the best times for water sports.
texts.text: and high tide, there can be strong currents. Therefore, please don't swim out too far. Our water sports team will be happy to provide you with the best times for water sports.

texts.orig: Half Board options only available at

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Bazaar Guests can order a la carte at LichtHaus for an additional cost Breakfast: 7am - 10:30am (Bazaar) Lunch: 12pm - 5pm (Bazaar or LichtHaus) Dinner: 7pm - 10:30pm (Bazaar or LichtHaus)
texts.text: Bazaar Guests can order a la carte at LichtHaus for an additional cost Breakfast: 7am - 10:30am (Bazaar) Lunch: 12pm - 5pm (Bazaar or LichtHaus) Dinner: 7pm - 10:30pm (Bazaar or LichtHaus)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Main Pool + Bazaar Pool Our two pools as well as the jacuzzi are filled with saltwater. Opening Hours: Main Pool: 6 am - 7 pm Bazaar Pool: 6 am - 11 pm (please note that pools are treated every two days, please pay attention to the treatment signs)
texts.text: Main Pool + Bazaar Pool Our two pools as well as the jacuzzi are filled with saltwater. Opening Hours: Main Pool: 6 am - 7 pm Bazaar Pool: 6 am - 11 pm (please note that pools are treated every two days, please pay attention to the treatment signs)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Please don't take your room key to the beach or on excursions. Instead leave it at the reception. In case you lose it, we will bill you the exchange of the lock for your own safety of 5000 KES.
texts.text: Please don't take your room key to the beach or on excursions. Instead leave it at the reception. In case you lose it, we will bill you the exchange of the lock for your own safety of 5000 KES.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Smoking is only allowed on your room's veranda as well as designated areas. Please don't smoke where there is an outside roof as this is a fire hazard.
texts.text: Smoking is only allowed on your room's veranda as well as designated areas. Please don't smoke where there is an outside roof as this is a fire hazard.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: You can find our table tennis area behind the Bazaar restaurant. You can borrow rackets for a small deposit at the reception.
texts.text: You can find our table tennis area behind the Bazaar restaurant. You can borrow rackets for a small deposit at the reception.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Please contact the reception to make sure your taxi is readily available at your desired time. The reception can also organise TukTuks and Boda Bodas.
texts.text: Please contact the reception to make sure your taxi is readily available at your desired time. The reception can also organise TukTuks and Boda Bodas.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Our tap water is not drinking water. It is safe to use for tea and coffee after boiling it, and it is safe to use for brushing your teeth. For other purposes, please use the daily refilled drinking water bottles in your room.
texts.text: Our tap water is not drinking water. It is safe to use for tea and coffee after boiling it, and it is safe to use for brushing your teeth. For other purposes, please use the daily refilled drinking water bottles in your room.

texts.orig: To check on the high and low tides please scan the following QR code:
texts.text: To check on the high and low tides please scan the following QR code:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Please contact our experience team for any activities on the water. Be it kayaking, stand up paddle boarding, sailing, snorkelling, fish and bird watching with our glass bottom boat, or kitesurfing.
texts.text: Please contact our experience team for any activities on the water. Be it kayaking, stand up paddle boarding, sailing, snorkelling, fish and bird watching with our glass bottom boat, or kitesurfing.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Pool & Beach Towels: You can get these at Bazaar and the main pool. Please ask our staff for further assistance.
texts.text: Pool & Beach Towels: You can get these at Bazaar and the main pool. Please ask our staff for further assistance.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Bathroom Towels: Please help us save the environment: a towel on the floor indicates 'Please Exchange!' while a towel on the rail means that you want to keep using it.
texts.text: Bathroom Towels: Please help us save the environment: a towel on the floor indicates 'Please Exchange!' while a towel on the rail means that you want to keep using it.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Yoga takes place every Tuesday Sunday on our Yoga Deck. It is free for hotel guests or 1,000 KES for non-guests. Private sessions can be arranged for 3,000 KES. Mats & pre-yoga ginger shot are provided. Pre-booking at reception or by phone is required: +254-722-204-131. Please look for more yoga details on our experience board or ask our

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Share your experience with the world and rate us on TripAdvisor, HolidayCheck, Booking.com, Google etc.. Or just tell your friends ;) Thank you!
